name: Chunky Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 large carrots, peeled and thinly sliced
2 chicken breast halves without skin or bones
2 cups garbanzo beans, cooked or 15 minutes dried beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart crock pot, combine onion, celery, carrots, and cauliflower.
2. Add chicken, broth, beans, rice, thyme, basil, marjoram, bay leaves, and pepper.
3. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
4. Lower heat to low and cook an additional 6 to 8 hours.
5. Remove bay leaves and discard.
6. Remove chicken when cool enough to handle, remove from bones, and cut into bite-sized pieces.
7. Add stewed tomatoes to the crock pot and cook on high for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Return chicken to the crock pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes before serving.
